fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you want to convert the VAT product posting group or the general product posting group.

fields.name: From Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the current general product posting group that will be changed in connection with the VAT rate conversion.

fields.name: To Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new general product posting group that will result from the conversion in connection with the VAT rate conversion.

fields.name: Converted Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the VAT rate change conversion was performed.
